feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Held Without Ropes
entry.summary:
Author: batsandbees

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,549Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: Dick bared his teeth, barely holding back his response. He couldn't afford to piss Jason off any further than he already had. It wasn't worth it. Eventually Jason would get bored and let them go. Or he'd slip up and they'd escape. One way or another, it would be over soon enough. They just had to get through it.

entry.title: Carbon Dioxide
entry.summary:
Author: Autumn_Bitters (Winterlynne_Norvic)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,506Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: “Good patrol?” Jason asks an eon later. Dick nods. “Uneventful.” A word that is synonymous with safe in their line of work. “My red slushy was kind of nasty.” Jason snorts and Dick can’t help but grin himself. There’s an air of ridiculousness when they skirt around the topic of Dick’s appetite. “Had something to wash it down with later in the night.” Nodding along, Jason finally comes to the last of his tasks, with only the pot still cooking away on the stove. He takes a moment to be still before replying. “Cherry isn’t my preferred slushy either.” Ironic to Dick, when Jason smells of cherries himself. “Too artificial, ” He continues. “Fresh ones you can bite into are always better.” He says it with a wry grin, and there, Dick is inclined to agree. He tilts his head, “You know,” He starts, although he’s never mentioned it to Jason before. “You smell like black cherries to me. Tart ones.” His tongue runs along the inside of his teeth as they itch with that familiar curiosity. Never ache, never thirst. Just itch. … Vamprism isn’t a choice Dick got to make, but Jason and Damian prove to Dick there’s value in being among the undead and resurrected.

entry.title: Shot Through the Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SaviouroftheStars

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,142Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 152

Summary: Jason Todd died once. It didn’t stick. Now a revenant with a stuttering heartbeat and a soul that won’t stay buried, he hunts the things that crawl out of the dark. But nothing he’s fought, not demons, not ghosts, not monsters wearing human skin, comes close to the pair now stalking the hunter circuit. They’re carving through veteran hunters like wheat. One is a towering brute in a mask.The other is a beautiful, shackled young man whose presence feels like gravity—quiet, strange, and impossible to ignore. Every instinct Jason has screams danger. Something about him feels ancient, bound, wrong. And yet Jason can’t look away. He’s going to have to kill them both. He just wishes the pretty one wasn’t making the job so damn complicated.

entry.title: High on Hate
entry.summary:
Author: Dickcest

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,137Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: He didn't see the person coming up behind him, needle in hand. It was too late for the golden boy, sticks out in front of him at the dozens of combatants he had dropped. Usually he would have noticed. Usually they wouldn't have gotten around his guard, Jason thinks, but it's been hours of Dick stalking the drug dealers and a good bit spent fighting them.He was tired.He was sloppy.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,938Chapters: 5/16Kudos: 268

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,074Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 20

entry.title: bunny, oh bunny (isn't it funny?)
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,833Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: He'd felt so exposed, sitting here like it was a normal day and that he wasn't splayed out on Jason's lap in front of a mirror. There’s a pressure building up, an overwhelm that Dick didn’t really know how or what to do about. He’d never hated the fact that he was so close to getting relief just to have it stopped every time he went to move even the slightest bit.“Jay," Dick gasps, "Jay, c'mon-"“Stop talking,” Jason replies and it’s cold—some might even say it was cruel in its tone—but Dick knows better. He feels Jason, he knows Jason want to do more because every time Dick moves ever so slightly Jason throbs; it’s really just a battle of who would break first. Would it be Dick, the certified brat, or Jason, the certified brat tamer? Nobody really knew and, when you're dealing with two of the most competitive people this side of New Jersey, it was like waiting for a bomb to drop.or: my piece for the Grayson Gets Hooded Bunnywing Special and a scene in my brain from an office inspired AU that I haven't gotten around to writing but wanted this specific scene out of my brain because why the hell not?

entry.title: The Dynamic Duo
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,457Chapters: 5/34Kudos: 197

Summary: Having been Batman for four years, Dick Grayson still hasn't gotten used to the heaviness of the cowl. Now, investigating a mass disappearance case that happened a few days ago in a late-night diner, Dick meets a young street rat who's had friends tangled up in the same web. Jason Todd has all the traits Dick saw in himself when he first started—curious, shrewd, agile, and, most importantly, wanting to do good. Despite Dick's initial rejection of the boy, he starts to think that a long-term partnership isn't a bad idea. Perhaps four years have been long enough time for the current stasis. Perhaps, he thinks, it's time for his own Robin.

entry.title: The Little Wing Loophole
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,699Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 23

Summary: Dick was not pleased. If you asked him, and really you should in his opinion, Slade was being completely unreasonable. Sure maybe he'd gotten a little too cheeky when the older man had been packing for another work trip. Daddy'd been going on too many of those lately in Dick's defense, so really it was very unfair that he wasn't allowed to cum until Daddy came back. Especially when Dick was already feeling riled up from having Jason coming to visit again. Jason didn't even have any stupid rules about whether or not he could get off. Well once Dick thought about it, technically Jason didn't have a rule about whether or not he could make Dick come if that's what he wanted to do, and Jason did really like that. So then really Dick would just be being helpful taking care of Jason until Slade got back, and how could Dick get in trouble for that?

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,435Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.
